Puls..Abdomen, hard: It brings about especially a tumid fullness of the abdomen, such a stuffed feeling that she cannot breathe.
Puls..Abdomen, rumbling: Many troubles seem to manifest themselves in the abdomen by bloating, distension of the abdomen, flatulence, colicky pains, rumbling, fermentation of food, and from disorders of menstruation or diarrhea.
Puls..Back: In curvature of the spine Puls. is of great value. Pain in the back, lumbar and sacral regions; wandering pains; spinal irritation after sexual excesses. Rheumatic pains in the spine and limbs, worse during rest and better from slow motion.
Puls..Back, coldness: Pain in small of back as if sprained; sensation of cold water poured down back.
Puls..Back, coldness, extending, down back: sensation of cold water poured down back.
Puls..Back, pain: Pain in the back, lumbar and sacral regions; wandering pains; spinal irritation after sexual excesses. Rheumatic pains in the spine and limbs, worse during rest and better from slow motion. Pain in small of back as if sprained.
Puls..Back, pain, dorsal region: great soreness in the back relieved by lying on something hard.
Puls..Bladder: Pulsatilla establishes a chronic, inveterate catarrh of the bladder. Copious mucous discharge, bloody discharge, especially after taking cold. Thick, ropy, purulent, green, offensive discharge.
Puls..Bladder, urination, frequent: frequent, scanty, with urging; wonderful tenesmus; extremely painful, bloody, burning, smarting urine; there is scarcely a drop collects in the bladder but it must be expelled.
Puls..Chest: Dry, teasing cough and dyspnoea; wants the windows open, aggravated lying down. Cough gagging and choking. Copious expectoration in the morning, of thick yellow-green mucus. Dry, teasing cough at night, worse lying down. Sensation of fullness in the chest in the evening with pulsation preventing sleep.
Puls..Heart & Circulation, palpitation: Palpitation from lying on the left side. Cannot sleep on the left side as it increases the palpitation and suffocation.
Puls..Heart & Circulation, palpitation, eating: Dyspnoea; oppression from walking fast or becoming overheated after eating.
Puls..Chill: Pulsatilla cures intermittent fever, coming on from; disordered stomach. Chill morning and evening daily. The chill begins in the bands and feet; pains in the limbs during the chill; one sided coldness with numb feeling; fever one sided.
Puls..Extremities: All the limbs are painful; drawing, tearing pains in the limbs, better from motion and after motion; worse from a warm room and better from cold applications. Marked restlessness and twitching of the limbs and feet; numbness of the limb, lain on; wandering pains in all the limbs.
Puls..Extremities, coldness: The chill begins in the bands and feet; pains in the limbs during the chill; one sided coldness with numb feeling.
Puls..Extremities, coldness, hands: The chill begins in the bands and feet.
Puls..Generalities: The patient is commonly relieved from slow motion in the open air, becomes frantic when trying to keep still, worse during rest, ameliorated by doing something, generally slow, moderate motion. This relief from motion and aggravation from rest, relief in the open air, and aggravation in a warm room give us a good summary of this beautiful remedy.
Puls..Generalities, faintness, fainting: Nervous manifestations, twitchings, spell of blindness and fainting.
The Pulsatilla headache is a throbbing congestive headache; much, heat in the head, ameliorated by the application of cold, by external pressure.
Puls..Genitalia female: Exaggerated sexual desire; nymphomania; wild, beside herself with sexual thoughts; uncontrollable sexual desire. Inflammation of ovaries and uterus. Suppression of menses from getting feet wet. Menses too late, scanty.
Puls..Genitalia female, pain: Violent menstrual colic, causing her to bend double; soreness in the region of the uterus and ovaries; distended abdomen; throws the covers off; wants the windows open; tearful; weeps without a cause.
Puls..Genitalia female, pain, sore, uterus: Violent menstrual colic, causing her to bend double; soreness in the region of the uterus and ovaries.
Puls..Head: Pulsatilla has violent headaches. Headaches in school girls who are about to menstruate. Headache accompanying menstruation. Headache associated with suppressed menses, with menstrual disorders; not caused from them, but associated with them. Pains through the temples and sides of the head are common Pulsatilla headaches.
Puls..Mind: She is tearful, plethoric, and generally has little credit for being sick from her appearances; yet she is most nervous, fidgety, changeable, easily led and easily persuaded. While she is mild, gentle and tearful, yet she is remarkably irritable, not in the sense of pugnacity, but easily irritated, extremely touchy, always feels slighted or fears she will be slighted; sensible to every social influence.
Puls..Mind, irritability: While she is mild, gentle and tearful, yet she is remarkably irritable, not in the sense of pugnacity, but easily irritated, extremely touchy, always feels slighted or fears she will be slighted; sensible to every social influence.
Puls..Mind, quiet, quiet disposition: She is tearful, plethoric, and generally has little credit for being sick from her appearances; yet she is most nervous, fidgety, changeable, easily led and easily persuaded. While she is mild, gentle and tearful.
Puls..Mind, restlessness, nervousness: There is much restlessness in Pulsatilla. She becomes so nervous in a room while at rest that the pains seem intensified and she must move about.
